title: Next.js 16 Frontend Starter
description: TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, shadcn/ui, TanStack Query, i18n, multi-theme, auth flows र स्पष्ट architecture सहित production-ready आधार — boilerplate होइन, features ship गर्नुहोस्।

integrated.title: एकीकृत stack
integrated.subtitle: आइकनसहित जडान गरिएका packages र tools — निर्माणका लागि तयार।

pageGroups.title: Starter अन्वेषण गर्नुहोस्
pageGroups.subtitle: Live र placeholder pages भएका route groups — प्रत्येक section preview गर्न क्लिक गर्नुहोस्।

auth.title: Authentication
auth.description: Login, register र forgot password forms, validation र mock API hooks सहित implement गरिएको छ।

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Overview, profile, settings र billing placeholder pages सहित protected app shell।

legal.title: Legal
legal.description: Privacy, terms र cookie policy placeholder pages।

roadmap.title: आगामी releases
roadmap.subtitle: auth forms, themes र service layer तयार भएपछि अर्को चरण।

testing.title: Testing suite
testing.description: Playwright E2E र Vitest unit tests उदाहरण coverage सहित।

authCompletion.title: Auth flow completion
authCompletion.description: Reset password, verify email र verification success pages पूर्ण form patterns सहित।

backendIntegration.title: Real backend integration
backendIntegration.description: Mock auth APIs लाई live backend मा typed Axios clients ले प्रतिस्थापन गर्नुहोस्।

deployment.title: Deployment workflows
deployment.description: Staging र production मा automated deploy।
